title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2 and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM, embeddings and tool-calling chains.

title: ollama-webui (open-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly ollama-webui) with chat, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Convenience CLI wrapper around Ollama REST API written in Node; supports chat, model ops.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like agent using Ollama models for code completion.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example with Ollama, Chroma and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that pipes chat to any Ollama model with slash commands.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot using python-telegram-bot and ollama-python for local LLM chat.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; sync/async, streaming, embeddings.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside the editor with completion and chat.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that forwards channel DMs to Ollama and streams back responses.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat/generate as a tool for Claude Desktop.
